articles.title: Inter haven't won a derby against Milan for (almost) two years
articles.summary: Milan beat Inter 1-0 and won the Derby della Madonnina: en-plein for the Rossoneri this season with the same result as the first leg, this time thanks to a goal from Pervis Estupinan, an unexpected protagonist.

articles.title: Milan wins the Derby! Three points that reopen the championship? The updated ranking
